title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Navkar Corporation - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Navkar Corporation - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Navkar Corporation family as a Distribution Manager in Jabalpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Navkar Corporation:
Navkar Corporation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navkar Corporation!
